errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"error": "session_expired", "message": "Authentication failed \u2014 the user's session token is expired or invalid. The user needs to disconnect and reconnect the Human Design MCP server in their AI client (e.g. Claude Desktop \u2192 Settings \u2192 Integrations, or ChatGPT \u2192 Settings \u2192 Connected apps). This is a one-time fix that takes about 10 seconds."}
